description: Create a Tcl/Tk periodic table element browser application. Write a Tcl/Tk script at ~/Documents/element_browser.tcl that reads the real periodic table data from ~/Documents/periodic_table.csv (IUPAC standard atomic weights for elements 1-36) and displays it in an interactive GUI. The application must include: (1) a scrollable listbox showing all element names, (2) a detail panel that shows the selected element's atomic number, symbol, name, atomic weight, category, and phase when an element is clicked in the list, and (3) a search entry field at the top that filters the list as the user types. After writing the script, save it and run it with 'wish ~/Documents/element_browser.tcl' in the terminal. The application window should be visible with the element data loaded.

metadata.data_source: IUPAC 2021 Standard Atomic Weights, elements 1-36 (H through Kr)
